action.reasoning: Observation: The baseline MLP PPO with flat observations scored 0% success on all 500 eval episodes. Analysis: Flattening the 7x7x3 image into a 151-dim vector and training for only 200k timesteps is highly suboptimal for Minigrid — spatial structure is destroyed and each env received just ~20k steps. Additionally, dividing raw categorical indices by 255 squashes informative signals. Decision: Switch to an embedding-based feature extractor that treats each image channel (object, color, state) as categorical and maps them through nn.Embedding before an MLP. Return observations as (3,7,7) float32 to avoid SB3's automatic /255 normalization. Place the custom extractor in a separate importable module (model.py) so SB3 can reload it in predict.py. Train for 1M timesteps and evaluate.
